title: Landslide Early Warning And Vulnerability Mapping In The Himalayan Region
summary: Build a verified workflow for landslide susceptibility mapping and early warning in the Himalayan region, linking satellite-derived slope-stability data, rainfall-trigger data, and population-exposure data.
why_it_matters: Build a verified workflow for landslide susceptibility mapping and early warning in the Himalayan region, linking satellite-derived slope-stability data, rainfall-trigger data, and population-exposure data.

success_metrics.target: Every claim links dated evidence with methodology.

review_policy.merge_gate: Schema validation, domain review, safety review, replication.
